calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: A. Howell.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
Declaration of plaintiff in lieu of personal testimony at trial (CCP 98) filed 05-11-11.
No appearance by Defendant Michael Novak.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal $5,739.51
Costs - $264.00
Total - $6,003.51
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Set For Trial On Jun-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
